title: DB: query
description: A database query executed via Django ORM or SQLAlchemy (Flask). Emitted by DBHoneybadger. Excludes queries matching the configured exclude_queries patterns.

query.description: SQL query string. Not obfuscated — bind parameters may appear as literals depending on the driver.

params.description: Query parameters. Only present when include_params is enabled in insights_config.

request_id.description: Request ID from event context, ties this query to the enclosing request.
